name: tas-v70-18-1-foundation-lock
description: Telemetry Assurance Studio v70.18.1 Foundation Lock — reproducible AURORA baseline

scripts.build:cloudflare: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run build:app && npm run prepare:cloudflare-dist
scripts.test:regression: npm run test:parity && npm run test:v70 && npm run test:commercial-parity && npm run test:visible-input && npm run test:golden-compare && npm run test:left-navigation && npm run test:professional-layout && npm run test:compact-panes && npm run test:original-pane-parity && npm run test:desktop-viewport && npm run test:customer-before-after && npm run test:redundancy-clean && npm run test:output-friendly && npm run test:premium-golden-assurance && npm run test:event-intel && npm run test:sortable-event-table && npm run test:event-source-column && npm run test:event-column-order && npm run test:standalone-direct-deploy && npm run test:aurora && npm run test:deploy-runner && npm run test:project-separation && npm run test:repository-copy && npm run test:foundation-lock
scripts.validate: npm run build:cloudflare && npm run test:regression && npm run write:validation-report && npm run prepare:cloudflare-dist
